title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.1804 - Regional taxicab commission established, powers
text:
67.1804.  Regional taxicab commission established, powers. — For the regional taxicab district, there is hereby established a "Regional Taxicab Commission", which shall be a body politic and corporate vested with all the powers expressly granted to it herein and created for the public purposes of recognizing taxicab service as a public transportation system, improving the quality of the system, and exercising primary authority over the provision of licensing, control and regulations of taxicab services within the district.
(L. 2002 H.B. 1041)
